title: elyutils
description: its basicly a utility mod with everything you need for elytrapvp and some more so yea
body:
Client-side tweaks for 1.21. Right Alt opens the menu by default (you can change it in Config).

**HUD**
- FPS display
- Scoreboard on/off

**MISC**
- Visual Ratio – stretch the game view
- Viewmodel Changer – pos/rot/scale on held items
- Chat Toggle – keybind to hide chat
- Nameprotect – fake name in tab/chat
- UnBoundFOV – FOV past 110 up to 180
- Bindcommands – keybind macros

**Visuals**
- HitBox – custom hitbox colors/width when you press F3+B
- Nametags – health, ping
- No Hand Sway, No Fire, No Elytra Render
- Totem Particles – color picker

**Config**
- Settings save to BGMANAGER folder in your game dir
- Load/save custom configs
- Open GUI keybind is rebindable in the Config tab

Requires Fabric API and ModernUI.
